name: Water Rights Intake
description: Agricultural water rights assessment. Evaluates an operation's water rights portfolio — doctrine, priority dates, decreed volumes, permitted uses, transfer history, and current adequacy — to produce a water rights profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended professional actions. Jurisdiction-sensitive — prior appropriation and riparian doctrine handled distinctly.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Water Rights Profile
types.description: Generated water rights profile from intake session data.
